work.title: Software Engineer II
experiences: Key contributor – Part of a 3-person engineering team that architected and delivered a $1.5 million dollar mission-critical software suite (HEI 1.0 and HEI NOVA) for the US Army Special Forces (Green Berets).

Offline-First Browser Engineering – Developed an offline-first storage engine using Web Workers, DexieDB, and Origin Private File System (OPFS). Offering data persistence and synchronization for remote / offline environments requiring minimal network connectivity.
Internal Tooling & Monorepo Management – Authored a majority of @ke-libraries/ui which standardized layouts and web components intended for fast-paced development in all KE products.

Core Product Engineering: Owned and solely developed a candidate intelligence dashboard (search, analytics, exam overview) that was selected for demonstration to senior leadership within United States Army Special Operations Command, contributing to stakeholder evaluation and product direction.

Devops and Data Orchestration – Engineered a fault-tolerant TypeScript CLI tool to automate complex data seeding supporting 40+ relational tables in production for IL-5 and IL-2 government cloud environments.

Migration & Reporting - Developed candidate report automation software for HEI 1.0 (Dataverse) and successfully migrated the logic to the NOVA data model (PostgreSQL) resulting in 50% speedup. Built automated pipelines to process these independent data sources for candidate performance tracking against cohort-wide KPIs.
